headline: Knicks 🏀👑 TORCH BUSES 🔥🚌 after SPURS SLAY 💥🏆
text: NYC streets went FULL CHAOS 🤯🌃 after the Knicks 🏀👑 SLAYED the Spurs 🏀🗡️ 94-90 in Texas 🗺️🍖 to SNATCH the chip 🏆💎 for the first time in 50+ YEARS ⏳😱! Fans spilled into the streets like it was New Year’s Eve on STEROIDS 🍾🚀, but then the party turned into a BRAWL BASH 💥🥊! A 17-year-old got his FOOT POPPED 🦶💥 near Times Square 🎭🕒 and school buses got TORCHED 🔥🚌 like they owed money! NYPD said crowds went FULL RECKLESS MODE 😤🦍 with bats 🏏 smashing windshields, cones 🛑 flying like confetti, and fireworks 💥 lighting up the night like a bad EDM set! 63 people got CUFFED 🔒🚔 for everything from assaulting cops 👮‍♂️💢 to weapon possession 🔫😬! Ten officers took L’s 😩🩹 including one punched in the FACE 🤕 and another BOTTLE-BONKED 🍾! Owner James Dolan begged fans to STAY CHILL 🧊 but Knicks fans said “HOLD MY BEER” 🍺 and went full MAYHEM MODE! Official parade coming Thursday 🎉🏙️ so get ready to celebrate without the chaos next time 😎🔥
